tblSales.description: Sales transaction headers. Each row is one completed sale rung up at a POS till — totals, payment breakdown, tax, customer info, the user who rang it up. Line items live in tblSalesLineItems and cash-tender breakdowns in tblSalesCashTenders.

columns.sale_id: Sale transaction identifier — PK on tblSales, FK everywhere else.
columns.shop_id: Branch / store where this row originated. Joins to the shop master.
columns.member_id: Loyalty member's internal numeric ID (FK to member master).
columns.sale_date: Sale date — primary date for sales reporting.
columns.invoice_no: Invoice number visible to the customer / on receipts.
columns.adjustment_amount: Manager / markdown adjustment applied to the sale total.
columns.GT_amount: Gross total — sale amount INCLUDING tax/VAT. Examples: 4914.0000, 769.0000, 5999.0000.
columns.Mark_Discount: Markdown discount amount applied to the sale (cumulative markdown across lines).
columns.NT_amount: Net total — sale amount EXCLUDING tax/VAT. Examples: 4915.0000, 770.0000, 6000.0000.
columns.user_id: Application user who performed this action (joins to the user master).
columns.pos_code: POS / till terminal alphanumeric code (e.g., S03, S22, 012).
columns.book_no: Receipt-book serial used by the POS for paper-trail numbering.
columns.member_no: Customer-facing membership number (printed on the loyalty card).
columns.cust_cash: Cash physically handed over by the customer at the till. Examples: 4915.0000, 6000.0000.
columns.Cust_name: Customer's name as entered at the till. Examples: khalid, Saif.
columns.isCreditSale: Flag: this sale was made on credit (on account, not paid in full).
columns.isMixSale: Flag: legacy 'mixed tender' flag — sale was paid using more than one tender type.
columns.Cash_amt: Cash component of the sale's total payment.
columns.Card_amt: Card payment amount for this sale.
columns.PointsEarned: Loyalty points earned by the customer on this transaction.
columns.PointsEarnedValue: Currency value of the points earned (points × rate).
columns.PointsRedeemed: Loyalty points redeemed by the customer on this transaction.
columns.PointsRedeemedValue: Currency value of the points redeemed.
columns.memberShopID: Shop where the loyalty member is registered.
columns.Exchange_Rate: FX rate used at transaction time (source currency to base). Examples: -0.003906250000.
columns.IsMultiplePayments: Flag: sale was paid in multiple payment instalments / split across MOPs.
columns.OfflineTillSaleID: Source ID from the offline-till queue (sale captured while disconnected).
columns.CustomerReceipt: Amount printed on the customer receipt.
columns.CustomerPrevBalance: Customer's outstanding balance before this transaction.
columns.TableId: Restaurant / dine-in table identifier (for F&B deployments).
columns.TableStatus: Dine-in table status (e.g., Final, Open). Examples: Final.
columns.SaleReturningNo: Sale number of the original sale being returned against (used for refund linkage).
columns.IsWebSale: Flag: sale originated from the web-store, not the in-store POS.
columns.CouponNo: Unique coupon code on a printed / issued coupon.
columns.Override_UserId: Application user who performed this action (joins to the user master).
columns.ShowTagPrice: Flag: print the tag price on the receipt.
